case_title: NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL et al VS. TIFFANY MCCLENDON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENDON, TIFFANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN SERVED MAY-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENDON, TIFFANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENDON, TIFFANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENDON, TIFFANY DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLENDON, TIFFANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 27 DASHIELL HAMMETT STREET, #31 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
